title: PB-149 VERIFIED: Core Runtime Extraction Program
scope: Program plan for extracting PB-148 runtime_governance_core branches only. No runtime code extraction or branch mutation is authorized by this evidence artifact.
extraction_principles: Never merge historical runtime branches directly.
Extract only minimal runtime deltas into new scoped governance/* branches.
Keep evidence, docs, recovery assets, and generated reports out of runtime extraction unless directly required by tests.
Resolve branch hygiene and metadata authority before relying on automated release flow.
Resolve gateway/policy runtime before intake, Euria, or connector orchestration layers.
Fail closed on incomplete diffs, failed tests, missing audit evidence, or unresolved dependencies.

extraction_sequence.objective: Stabilize governed branch lifecycle, PR body authority, and release metadata before additional runtime branches are extracted.
entry_criteria: branch diff isolated by runtime file
evidence/docs/recovery artifacts excluded from runtime delta
exit_criteria: new governance/* extraction branch prepared by explicit request
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review required before merge

extraction_sequence.objective: Extract core runtime policy validation, gateway decision, and fail-closed enforcement modules.
entry_criteria: branch diff isolated by runtime file
evidence/docs/recovery artifacts excluded from runtime delta
exit_criteria: new governance/* extraction branch prepared by explicit request
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review required before merge

runtime_duplication_report.risk: Multiple branches touch the same runtime files, so direct branch merging creates high conflict and audit ambiguity risk.
runtime_duplication_report.control: Extract by runtime file/capability area from main, not by merging full branches.

implementation_gates.requirement: Branch diff limited to one runtime capability cluster.
implementation_gates.fail_closed: Block if unrelated docs/evidence/recovery assets are mixed into runtime delta.

implementation_gates.requirement: Focused tests pass for touched files.
implementation_gates.fail_closed: Block if focused tests fail or test scope cannot be justified.

implementation_gates.requirement: Evidence report records failure cause, fix summary, commands, and results.
implementation_gates.fail_closed: Block if audit evidence is missing or raw sensitive data is present.

implementation_gates.requirement: Full test suite required before merge-readiness claim for runtime-sensitive changes.
implementation_gates.fail_closed: Partial tests may support iteration only, not merge readiness.

implementation_gates.requirement: USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review before merge.
implementation_gates.fail_closed: No auto-approval, admin merge, or branch protection bypass.
